description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a matte black finish and subtle red accents along the barrel and grip. The body is robust, featuring a short, thick barrel with venting slots on the upper side and a prominent front sight. The grip is ergonomically shaped, resembling a pistol grip, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The receiver area includes visible mechanical details, such as a loading port and a top-mounted rail or sight. The overall design is tactical, with a focus on durability and ease of handling in close-quarters urban environments. The materials appear to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black and red finish, featuring a short barrel, pistol grip, and robust trigger guard. Designed for close-quarters use with modern, durable materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, front sight, and the width of the barrel and grip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the vented barrel, ergonomic pistol grip, and visible mechanical details on the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the grip, the top rail or sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and grip contours.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with venting slots on the upper side and a short, thick profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, substantial size, smooth with no finger grooves or reinforcement
